messages.content: help me revise this please
I'm sorry, I cannot help you revise anything unless you provide me with the content that needs revision.

Thank you so much. 
The consent letter will be ready by next Monday.
Please kindly let me know where I should send the documents to or who I should contact regarding to this matter.

Here's a possible revision:
"Thank you for your assistance. Just to confirm, will the consent letter be ready by next Monday? If so, please could you advise me on where to send the documents or whom to contact regarding this matter? Thank you again."

how about this?
We will issue the receipt and send to you after we receive the transaction confirmation from our bank. It probably takes a few day.

Here's a revised version:
"Please be advised that we will issue a receipt and send it to you once we receive confirmation of the transaction from our bank. This process may take a few days. Thank you for your understanding."

Yesterday I have a customer visited to see an office.
can you help me write an email offer rates for 6 month and 12 month

Certainly! Here's a draft of an email for your reference:

Dear [Customer's Name],

It was a pleasure meeting you yesterday and showing you our office space. We hope that it has met your expectations and that you are considering us as your next business location.

As we discussed during your visit, we offer flexible lease terms to suit our clients' needs. For your convenience, I have prepared two options for you:

1. 6-month lease: [Insert monthly rental rate here]
2. 12-month lease: [Insert discounted monthly rental rate here]

Please note that the rates above are inclusive of the following:
- Basic utilities (water and electricity)
- Air conditioning during business hours
- Internet connection
- Use of the meeting room (1 hour per month)

Should you have any inquiries or concerns regarding either option, please do not hesitate to get in touch with us. We would be happy to assist you further.

Thank you for considering our office as your potential business location. We look forward to hearing back from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

can you edit to this 
For your convenience, I have prepared a quotation of  Short term 1 - 3 month lease,   6-month lease and 12 month lease attached file to this email.

Sure, here's the revised statement:

"For your convenience, I have attached a quotation for a short-term 1-3 month lease, a 6-month lease, and a 12-month lease to this email."

Please add the following service too.
'Free Louge Usage
 Free Unlimited Document Scan
 Free Office Cleaning
Free 1 line Telephone Number
Free Telephone booth usage 20mins/session

Here's the revised statement with the added services:

"For your convenience, I have attached a quotation for a short-term 1-3 month lease, a 6-month lease, and a 12-month lease to this email. Please note that all leases include the following services at no additional cost:
- Free Lounge Usage
- Free Unlimited Document Scan
- Free Office Cleaning
- Free 1 Line Telephone Number
- Free Telephone Booth Usage (20 minutes per session)"
what should i name this email

Here are a few suggestions for your email subject line:

- Office Lease Quotation and Additional Services
- Pricing and Services for Short-Term and Long-Term Office Lease
- Your Office Lease Options and Complimentary Services
- Discover Our Office Leasing Rates and Benefits
- Start Your Business Journey with Our Office Lease Packages and Free Services

Feel free to customize them according to your preferences.
what should i say to customer who is sick

If a customer is sick, you could send them a message to express your concern and offer assistance. Here's a possible message:

Dear [Customer's Name],

I hope this message finds you well despite your sickness. Please know that we are thinking of you and wishing you a speedy recovery.

If there is anything we can assist you with during this time, please do not hesitate to let us know. Whether it's rescheduling a meeting or providing you with any information you may need, we are here to support you.

In the meantime, please take good care of yourself and follow your doctor's advice. We look forward to hearing from you when you are feeling better.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
That is too formal can you make it a bit friendly

Sure, here is a friendlier version of the message:

Hey [Customer's Name],

I heard that you're feeling under the weather. I'm sorry to hear that and I hope you're taking good care of yourself.

If there is anything we can do to help you out while you're recovering, just let us know. We're happy to accommodate any adjustments or arrangements.

Wishing you a speedy recovery, and we'll be looking forward to seeing you again soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

can you help me edit this
This is not urgent, we can complete the agreement together with the consent letter that we will need to receive it from Serm-Mit Building.
I have attached the invoice to this email.

Here's a possible revision:

"Just to follow up on the agreement and consent letter, please be advised that there is no urgent need to complete them at the moment. We will need to receive the consent letter from Serm-Mit Building to proceed with the agreement.

I have also attached the invoice for your reference. If you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out to us."

Hope this helps!
revise this please
I'm sorry but I don't see any message that needs revision. Kindly provide the original message that needs to be revised.

This is not urgent to complete them at the moment.
We will need to receive the consent letter from Serm-Mit building for setting up your company.
You can sign the agreement and consent letter together, Hopefully that the Serm-Mit building will issue the consent letter to us within next week.  
I have also attached the invoice of  Virtual office service fee 38,520THB to this email.  
If you have any questions or concerns, Please don't hesitate to reach out to us.

Here's a revised version of the message:

"Regarding the setup of your company, we would like to inform you that there is no urgent need to complete the agreement and consent letter at this stage. We are still waiting to receive the consent letter from Serm-Mit building to proceed with the process.

We suggest that you sign the agreement and consent letter when we receive the required document from the building. We are expecting to receive it within the coming week.

Also, we would like to remind you that we have attached the invoice for the virtual office service fee of 38,520THB to this email. Please check it over and if you have any questions or concerns, don't hesitate to reach out to us."

I hope this helps!

Can you edit this?
Thank you for the payment, I have attached the receipt to this email .
Sorry for the misunderstanding about the start date.
I have got suggestion from Khun gai to start the contract from 23rd June.
I have revised the Invoice/Tax invoice/ Agreement and  attached it to this email.

Here's a possible revision:

"Thank you for your payment. Please find the attached receipt for your reference.

I apologize for any confusion regarding the start date of the contract. After discussing it with Khun Gai, we have agreed to adjust the start date to June 23rd. As such, I have revised the invoice, tax invoice, and agreement accordingly. Please find them attached to this email.

If you have any questions or concerns regarding the revised documents, please do not hesitate to let us know. We appreciate your understanding and look forward to providing you with our services soon."

Hope this helps!

Can you revise thie
By the way, Do you have a Logo of your company  with your company name on it? Can you send us a JPG file? 
We will make your company name plate at the office entrance

Here's a possible revision:

"By the way, I was wondering if your company has a logo with the company name on it. If you do, would it be possible to send it to us as a JPG file? We would like to use it to create your name plate for the office entrance."

I hope this helps!
what should i say to make customer pay money for rent

Here's a possible message to request payment for rent:

Dear [Customer's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to follow up regarding the payment for your rent, which is currently overdue.

As you may know, the rent is a critical component to our business operations and we rely on timely payments to sustain and maintain our service to you. As such, we kindly ask that you please settle the outstanding balance as soon as possible to avoid any further delays or potential fees.

If you have any concerns or questions regarding the payment process, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are always happy to help.

Thank you for your attention to this matter and we appreciate your cooperation in helping us maintain our business operations.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
